title: Dot & Key Skincare — Fruity Summer Glow 🍊✨
body: 🚨 FUNKY COLLAB ALERT! 🚨 Dot & Key is looking for energetic creators for our Summer Glow campaign. We are paying ₹10,000! Deliverables: 1 Funky Transition Reel + 1 Aesthetic Feed Post. Apply now with your portfolio to get glowing skin and cash!

title: SmartWatch X — Lifestyle Creators Wanted
body: We are looking for authentic lifestyle creators to be part of the SmartWatch X launch. $2,500 paid collaboration. Apply with your portfolio.

title: UGC Creators Needed — TechCorp App
body: Show our productivity app in action. $800 for a 60–90 second TikTok. No scripted reads — just real usage.

title: Gifted: FreshBrand Wellness Kit Launch
body: Gifted collab for our new wellness starter kit. Looking for genuine health & fitness voices. Unboxing + 2-week review.

title: New Case Study: TechGadget X Campaign Results
body: Just wrapped up the TechGadget X SmartWatch campaign. 120K views, 8.6% engagement rate. The authentic review format really resonated with my tech audience. Full breakdown in my portfolio.

title: 30-Day Fitness Challenge — 55K Views, 10.8% Engagement
body: My 30-day transformation series hit 55K views with a 10.8% engagement rate. Fitness content is performing really well for my audience right now. Open to brand partnerships in this space.

title: Morning Routine Vlog — 210K Views Organic
body: This morning routine vlog hit 210K views completely organically. Lifestyle + productivity content is thriving. Looking for brands aligned with authentic, everyday living.
